description: This file contains utility functions for Bootstrap, specifically for enabling dismiss triggers on components such as alerts. It imports event handling and selector engine modules, and defines a function to attach click event listeners that trigger component dismissal.

methods.name: enableDismissTrigger
methods.description: Attaches a click event listener to dismiss a Bootstrap component (like alert) when an element with data-bs-dismiss attribute is clicked. It handles default actions, checks if the element is disabled, and calls the appropriate method (default 'hide') on the component instance.
